settings.heading: Warranty & Product Support
settings.intro: Coverage and help for the products you buy from us.

settings.content:
What's covered

Most products we sell include a [WARRANTY DURATION — e.g. 12-month] warranty against manufacturing defects, either through the manufacturer or through our store. Coverage specifics can vary by product and brand; check the product page or your documentation for details.

What's not covered

Warranties generally do not cover accidental damage, misuse, unauthorized repairs, normal wear, or consumable parts. [Adjust to match your actual policy.]

How to make a warranty claim

Contact us via the Contact page with your order number and a description of the issue (photos or video help). We'll guide you through diagnosis, repair, replacement, or manufacturer support as appropriate.

Product support

Need help with setup, compatibility, or troubleshooting? Our team is happy to assist — reach out and we'll point you in the right direction.

settings.title: Talk to a specialist
settings.text: Real people who know the products and can help you choose or fix.

settings.title: Warranty backed
settings.text: Clear coverage and a straightforward claims process.
